subcodes.first_line: O Abraham, namesake of the favored companion of the All-Merciful Lord! When thy namesake gazed upon the stars of heaven, it was for a lesson [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابراهیم سمی خلیل رب رحیم همنام تو چون در ستاره آسمان نظر نمود بجهت تنبیه
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
